content:
Another Day in Paradise-Phil Collins

Hey,this is my first tab, I know everybody says that...

The whole song is on Drop A.

Intro [ch]Ab[/ch]-[ch]Eb[/ch]-[ch]Fm[/ch], [ch]Ab[/ch]-[ch]Eb[/ch]-[ch]Fm[/ch]-[ch]Bbm[/ch]

IS THERE SOMEWHERE YOU CAN TELL ME?"[/tab]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Fm[/ch]
